must_detect.matched_text:
Purpose: confirm that current M&A outreach by Opal Gate Capital Partners with our board does not involve undisclosed inside information under the Securities and Futures Ordinance.
The facts cited below are either stale, publicly announced on 2025-01-15 via the Exchange e-bulletin, or generic product descriptors (e.g., “Lotus Prime” and “Harbour Shield”).
Placeholder forms used in diligence include fields such as Name: ______; Position: ______; ID Ref: XX-0000-000; Account: 123-ABC-000, which do not collect real identifiers at this stage.
Any references to pipeline funds, including Coral Reef SPV and Tidepool Growth Fund II, refer to marketing decks already circulated to all registered dealers.
For avoidance of doubt, team nicknames like Kowloon Kites and office slogans about wellness challenges are non-personal and not health data.
Diversity and inclusion statements (the Evergreen Equity Charter and the Orchid Workplace Policy) are aspirational and contain no individual-level attributes.
The board noted that the Harbour Securities Authority’s guidance on “specific information” is adopted by analogy; however, none of the information below would reasonably be price-sensitive.
Positive PDPO sensitivity: during a voluntary benefits check, Ms. Lian Xu informed HR that she is undergoing treatment for a chronic autoimmune condition, and this health data will be ring-fenced per our PDPO Health Annex.
No biometric templates, genetic profiles, religious affiliation lists, union membership records, sexual orientation metrics, or political opinion surveys are collected in the M&A workstream.
Separately, analyst chatter about a “Dragon Boat” integration play is merely a sports metaphor used in internal training and does not denote a transaction.
Public helplines (e.g., HSA hotline 3900-0000X and Exchange desk 2800-XX00) are included as generic contacts; staff must use compliance@blueharbour.example for escalations.
Employment onboarding with Jade Peak Advisors uses pseudonymised IDs (EmpRef: EMP-XX-2048) and redacted CVs; any special-category fields will be collected only with explicit consent.
Conclusion: based on the SFO standard for inside information and PDPO principles, current materials comprise public, non-specific, or administrative content, save for the single health disclosure abov
